name: Market Dojo eSourcing Platform API
what_it_does: Cloud-based eSourcing platform with REST API — enabling procurement teams to run RFI, RFP, RFQ events and electronic auctions (reverse auctions, sealed bid, Dutch auctions) with supplier portals, automated scoring, bid analytics, and spend analytics, designed for quick deployment without lengthy implementation projects.
use_cases: Creating and managing RFx events and auctions via Market Dojo API for sourcing workflow integration
Inviting suppliers and managing supplier portal access via Market Dojo API
Querying sourcing event results and auction analytics via API for procurement reporting
Integrating Market Dojo outcomes with procurement systems via API for data sync
Automating Market Dojo event creation from templates via API for category teams
not_for: Accounts payable and full P2P automation (Market Dojo is sourcing-only)
Complex award optimization with mathematical modeling (use Keelvar or Archlet)
Very large enterprises needing highly customized sourcing workflows (consider SAP Ariba)
best_when: A mid-market procurement team needs quick-to-deploy eSourcing with reverse auction capability — with a modern UI and no lengthy implementation, getting sourcing events live within days rather than months.
avoid_when: You need complex mathematical award optimization, full P2P coverage, or highly customized sourcing workflows requiring enterprise professional services.

auth.notes: API key for simple integrations. OAuth2 authorization code flow for user-delegated access. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access. Webhook for sourcing event and supplier response notifications. REST API for eSourcing workflow automation. Integration with Coupa, SAP Ariba, and procurement systems via API. Part of Ivalua ecosystem (Ivalua acquired Market Dojo in 2021).

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial available; no free tier
pricing.paid_tiers: From £1,500/month; event-based pricing also available; contact sales
pricing.notes: UK company (Bristol). Founded 2010. Acquired by Ivalua in 2021. Ivalua is a French procurement platform (backed by KKR). Market Dojo remains semi-independent within Ivalua. Known for rapid deployment (live in days vs. months for competitors). Reverse auction capability as key differentiator. Strong in UK/EU market. 300+ customers across manufacturing, financial services, retail. Modern UX-first approach to eSourcing. Ivalua acquisition creates P2P upsell pathway for Market Dojo customers.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for eSourcing event management. API key + OAuth2 auth. Moderate documentation. Webhook for event notifications. Ivalua acquisition may affect API development direction. UK company with GDPR compliance. Rate limits not documented. Annual contract required before API access.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Event reads fully idempotent. Supplier reads idempotent. Bid reads idempotent by event ID. Event creation requires external ID for idempotency.
known_agent_gotchas: Ivalua acquisition (2021) — product roadmap may shift toward Ivalua platform integration
Reverse auctions require careful legal review — some jurisdictions restrict auction-based procurement
UK company post-Brexit — verify GDPR adequacy for EU data transfers
Rate limits not documented — test before production integration
Annual contract typically required — verify before assuming monthly option

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and ISO27001 compliant. EU and UK data residency. OAuth2 and API key auth. UK company (post-Brexit GDPR compliance via UK GDPR). Auction data (bid amounts, supplier identities) is highly sensitive — enforce strict access controls. Reverse auction data must be protected from bid manipulation. Ivalua (French parent) adds EU data protection layer.
